nasb.text: Then he lifted up his face to the window and said, “Who is on my side? Who?” And two or three officials looked down at him.

esv.text: And he lifted up his face to the window and said, “Who is on my side? Who?” Two or three eunuchs looked out at him.

cnv.text: 耶戶抬頭對著窗戶，說：“有誰擁護我？誰？”立時有兩三個太監往外望著他。

ccb.text: 耶户抬头望着窗口，喊道：“谁拥护我？谁？”有两三个太监从窗口往外看他。
